title.default: MK Widget Card | Modern eCard & Widget Ecosystem

metadata.description: MK Widget Card is a digital business card (eCard), smart QR code, and home screen widget ecosystem for iOS and Android.

og.title: MK Widget Card | Digital Identity 2026
og.description: Create professional digital cards, integrate smart QR codes, and bring important info to your home screen with MK Widget Card.

hero.title: Modern eCard & Widget Ecosystem.
hero.desc: MK Widget Card helps you create professional digital business cards, integrate smart QR codes, and bring important information directly to your home screen through a seamless Widget system on iOS and Android.

ecard.title: Smart eCard QR
ecard.description: Create digital business cards and vCard-compliant contact QR codes to share professional information in an instant.

widget.title: Widget Experience
widget.description: Bring your profile, QR codes, and important shortcuts directly to your home screen through a smooth Widget system.

privacy.title: Security & Privacy
privacy.description: Data is stored locally and securely synced via App Groups, ensuring you always own your personal information.

save.title: Quick Contact Save
save.description: Scan someone else's eCard code and save it directly to your phone contacts automatically and accurately.

productSection.title: Comprehensive Digital Identity Solution.
productSection.description: MK Widget Card provides a closed-loop process from profile creation and smart QR code management to instant information display on your phone's home screen.

modulesSection.title: Flexible Component System.

modules.description: Gather all your Website, Facebook, LinkedIn, GitHub links into a single card.

modules.name: Plugin System
modules.description: Flexible modular structure allows you to easily toggle information components on your eCard.

privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy for MK Widget Card, covering local eCard data, QR scanning, device permissions and Widget sync.
privacy.label: Privacy Policy
privacy.title: Privacy Policy - MK Widget Card.
privacy.lastUpdated: Last updated: May 15, 2026. This policy describes how the MK Widget Card app collects, uses, and protects your information.
privacy.summaryDesc: The app prioritizes local storage and absolute privacy. Data is only saved to our servers if you explicitly sign in and save presets to your account for sync. Camera, Contacts, and Photo Library permissions are used only for scanning, saving eCards, and choosing profile pictures.

sections.title: 1. General Principles
body: MK Widget Card is designed to be privacy-first and local-first. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting the personal data of our users.
The app operates primarily by storing data directly on your device. We do not collect sensitive data on our servers unless you use account sync features.

sections.title: 2. Data You Provide
body: eCard Information: Full name, title, company, email, phone number, website, address, avatar, short bio, and social links.
QR Bank Data: Bank code, account number, and account holder name to generate VietQR codes.
Account Data: If you sign in, eCards, QR Banks, avatars, or eCard images may be stored for synchronization across devices.

sections.title: 3. Device Access Permissions
body: Camera: Used when you scan QR codes. We do not store images from the camera other than the decoded QR code content.
Photo Library: Used when you choose an avatar or upload an eCard image from your device.
Contacts: Allows you to save information from scanned eCards directly to your phone's contacts. The app only writes new info when you choose to save and does not read your existing contacts.
Notifications: Used to receive important updates or public system announcements within the app.

sections.title: 4. Storage and Syncing
body: Local Storage: All information is stored securely on your device's memory. On iOS, App Groups are used to share data between the main app and widgets.
Account Sync: Uses Supabase to store profiles, presets, and images when you are signed in. Data is transmitted via secure HTTPS connections.

sections.title: 5. Third-Party Services
body: Supabase: Provides infrastructure for sign-in, profile storage, and images.
VietQR: Used to load bank QR images when using the QR Bank feature.
Google Auth: Handles sign-in via Google and Supabase.
mktechvn.com: When sharing an eCard, the app creates a link containing the details you chose to make public.
Google Analytics: Used on the website for aggregated, non-personally identifiable usage measurement.

sections.title: 6. Widgets, QR codes, and sharing
body: QR codes and widgets display the data you entered. Others may see your information if they scan your code or receive a link you shared.
Only enter and share information that you are comfortable making public. You always have control to edit or delete your data.

sections.title: 7. Security and Tracking
body: We do not sell personal data, do not show ads, and do not use cross-app tracking.
Data is protected by HTTPS standards and OS security measures. You should protect your own device and personal account.

sections.title: 8. Updates and Contact
body: This policy may be updated as the app gains new features. Changes will be updated on this page.
For support or account data requests, please contact: contact@tranminhkhoi.dev

terms.metaDescription: Terms of service for MK Widget Card, including app use, user content, intellectual property and service limitations.
terms.label: Terms
terms.title: Terms of Service - MK Widget Card.
terms.lastUpdated: Last updated: May 15, 2026. These terms govern your use of our app and accompanying services.
terms.contactDesc: Any questions about the terms of service, please contact us via email: contact@tranminhkhoi.dev

sections.title: 1. Scope of Use
sections.body: MK Widget Card helps you create eCards, contact QR codes, bank QR codes, and quick-access widgets. You are responsible for the accuracy of the information you enter and share.

sections.title: 2. Intellectual Property Rights
sections.body: All content, source code, design, and logos related to MK Widget Card are owned by MKTech / Tran Minh Khoi. You may not copy or distribute them without consent.

sections.title: 3. User Content
sections.body: You are fully responsible for the personal information and data you enter into the app. You commit that the information provided is accurate and does not violate any laws.

sections.title: 4. Use of Service
sections.body: You may not use the app for any illegal purpose, including impersonating others or spreading false information through QR codes and sharing links.

sections.title: 5. Disclaimer
sections.body: The app is provided 'as is'. We are not responsible for any data loss or damage arising from the use of the app or issues from third-party services.

sections.title: 6. Changes to Terms
sections.body: We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Your continued use of the app after changes constitute your acceptance of the new terms.
